blockingIssues.description: GET /api/actions does not validate malformed or negative pagination params (limit/offset), so invalid input can propagate to storage/database and produce 500s instead of 400.
actionDetector dedup checks persisted pending actions only, so duplicate actions can be generated within the same detectActions batch for the same contact/actionType.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify storage method userId guidance so create-method signatures are unambiguous (explicit userId parameter vs userId in insert payload), and align this rule with repository patterns.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for phase2-schema-and-storage flagged ambiguity between mission guidance and current storage signatures used in server/storage.ts.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen route validation guidance to require schema-based validation (Zod) for query/body params including numeric pagination and date parsing.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: phase2-actions-api-routes failed on invalid query handling where manual parseInt/new Date checks missed malformed inputs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reconcile TDD/manual verification requirements with actual enforcement and reporting so workers cannot mark followedProcedure=true without explicit RED phase and manual endpoint checks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple phase2-backend reviews reported implementation-first flow and command-only verification while skill procedure requires tests-first plus manual checks.

rejectedObservations.observation: Windows db:push interactivity caveat should be applied immediately to shared commands.
